prompt_queue.prompt: Industry: print, paper, and stationery. Generate one distinct, buildable store concept for print, paper, and stationery. Examples of valid sub-spaces: letterpress and risograph studios, fountain pens and inks, planners and notebooks for a specific workflow, archival paper and bookbinding, fine art prints, calligraphy supplies, sticker culture, stamps and seals, gift wrap and ephemera, journaling for a specific community. Stay inside print, paper, and stationery; do not drift into general office supplies or generic gifts.
